response.original_title: 危険な情事　若妻乱熟
response.overview: A sensual drama depicting the love and hate between two couples living in the same apartment building, centered around the theme of swapping partners. Nozawa, investigating the stabbing death of Etsuko in her apartment, is shocked by the death of Etsuko, whom he met two months earlier at a swapping club he visited with his wife, Akiko, and with whom he subsequently had a sexual relationship. However, as he interrogates her husband, Saeki, he uncovers a surprising truth. Directed by Shuji Kataoka, who has produced numerous masterpieces in pink films, this ambitious work draws viewers into the darkness of sexuality through a suspenseful tragedy involving a couple.
response.title: 危険な情事　若妻乱熟
